---
title: 'Sayings To Live By'
date: '2019-02-22T18:24:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '3938443888329499148'
blogger_filename: '/p/sayings-to-live-by.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<h3 style="text-align: left;">
Quotes and Sayings that are worth remembering...</h3>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="text-align: left;">
<i>If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.brainyquote.com/quotes/quotes/a/alberteins383803.html">Albert Einstein</a></i></blockquote>
<br />
Here are some of my favorite sayings, quips, quotes, bible verses, and thoughts to ponder.&nbsp;<i>*Add your own in the comments below</i><br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg5_TkDiC2_D-RdLCYs9WtIWZG___ZMFlWw_41ZV0Ba8V_DEidOXcCXbRE_ZyLK-F7Bc7uHx4dqqiNF0GMOORod_QdiAGo1k6VSuEjn7AMKSfboDYWfir9IUJaAPHW2Q4afK5jmv588M6Y/s1600/5986540225_a7fb61a4db_b+(3).jpg"><img border="0" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg5_TkDiC2_D-RdLCYs9WtIWZG___ZMFlWw_41ZV0Ba8V_DEidOXcCXbRE_ZyLK-F7Bc7uHx4dqqiNF0GMOORod_QdiAGo1k6VSuEjn7AMKSfboDYWfir9IUJaAPHW2Q4afK5jmv588M6Y/s640/5986540225_a7fb61a4db_b+(3).jpg" /></a></div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<a href="https://flic.kr/p/a81zQM">Speak Up | Attribute Mustafa Khayat&nbsp;</a></div>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Wolfe Rules (Gibb's Style Rules)<br />
</h4><ol>
<li>NO HIDING - Radical transparency is required to live a life of Freedom.<br /></li><li><span style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 107%; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi; mso-fareast-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-fareast;">â€œLove God, Love Folks, donâ€™t be a dickâ€ (thanks to my forever irreverent
wife, Jen Nelson, for that quote)</span></li>
<li>It's okay to be not okay.<br /></li><li>Plans Fail. Live by Principles.</li><li>Plan plans, not outcomes. <br /></li>
<li>When in doubt: Shift into Low Slow</li>
<li>When Overwhelmed: Take the next indicated step.</li>
<li>What you compromise to keep, you will eventually loseâ€¦ keep first things first.</li>
<li>Do whatâ€™s right, because itâ€™s right, do it right, and do it right away.</li>
<li>Prayer: Is for hearing Godâ€™s Agenda not for bringing Him yours. - Ask Him what Heâ€™s doing, and participate. Donâ€™t tell Him what you want to see happen.</li>
<li>Theology: Donâ€™t seek out single verses, seek out meta-narratives, themes, and patterns in the whole Bible. Ask Him to reveal His Story to you, and your part in it. Only build theology on what the text of the bible can support (not on your favorite teacher or church tradition</li><li>Freedom is not the absence of something, it is the presence of someone (Yeshua HaMashiach).<br /></li></ol><h4>
<b>Albertisms:</b></h4>
<ul style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: left; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px;"><li>Strive not to be a success, but rather to be of value. Albert Einstein</li></ul>
<ul style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: left; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px;"><li>If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.brainyquote.com/quotes/quotes/a/alberteins383803.html">Albert Einstein</a></li></ul>
<ul style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: left; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px;"><li>The difference between stupidity and genius is that genius has its limits.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.brainyquote.com/quotes/quotes/a/alberteins148851.html">Albert Einstein</a></li></ul>
<ul style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: left; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px;"><li>To admit that you were wrong is to declare that you are wiser now than you were before. Albert Einstein.</li></ul><ul style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: left; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px;"><li>Stay away from negative people, they have a problem for every solution. AE&nbsp;</li></ul><ul style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: left; text-decoration-color: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px;"><li>Imagination
 is more important than knowledge. For knowledge is limited, whereas 
imagination embraces the entire world, stimulating progress, giving 
birth to evolution. AE, What Life Means to Einstein (1924).</li></ul>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1-gg5uen3alax2yx0gxhpaig-eb14e20658cb.jpeg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="900" data-original-width="1200" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1-gg5uen3alax2yx0gxhpaig-97633b4316c9.jpeg" width="320" /></a></div><h4>
Religion is...</h4>
<ul>
<li>"Religion is the by-product left over after God's move has turned from movement to monument." Darrell Wolfe</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Religion is man's attempt to reach God. Jesus is God's attempt to reach&nbsp;man. Unknown</li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Religion attempts to overcome the Knowledge of Evil with the Knowledge of Good; but the Knowledge of&nbsp;Good will&nbsp;never re-connect you to&nbsp;LIFE, which is the real need of man. Life flows from a different tree. (Paraphrase) Bob Hamp</li></ul><br /><div style="text-align: left;"><h4>&nbsp;Biblical Scholars</h4><h4>&nbsp;NT Wright</h4><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>It is central to Christian living that we should celebrate the goodness of Creation, ponder its present brokenness, and insofar as we can, celebrate in advance the healing of the world, the New Creation itself. Art, music, literature, dance, theater, and many other expressions of human delight and wisdom, can all be explored in new ways. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CWbNJVvgQfV/" target="_blank">NT Wright</a><br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>People who believe in the resurrection, in God making a whole new world in which everything will be set right at last, are unstoppably motivated to work for that new world in the present. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CWWAQPoAF0f/" target="_blank">NT Wright</a> <br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Do not despise the small but significant act. God probably does not want you to recognize the entire discipline or the entire world of your vocation overnight. Learn to be symbol-makers and story-tellers for the Kingdom of God. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CWOaBiFAQHv/" target="_blank">NT Wright</a><br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><b>The great drama will end, not with "saved souls" being snatched up into heaven, away from wicked earth and the mortal bodies which have dragged them down into sin, but with the New Jerusalem coming down from heaven to earth, so that the "dwelling of God is with humans". <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CWEIXF4ASQC/" target="_blank">NT Wright</a></b><br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Traditions tell us where we have come from. Scripture itself is a better guide as to where we should be going now. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CVlLA16pqtK/" target="_blank">NT Wright</a><br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Jesus's first followers established a new thing - a network of worship-based, ethically rigorous, egalitarian, philanthropic, fictive kinship groups - "church" for short. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CUaqQWGA53x/" target="_blank">NT Wright</a><br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>What we have in Genesis (chapter one) is a lavish description of the house that God is making for Himself to dwell in, for Himself to become known and love in His world. And at the heart of it, He puts an image, which is the living, breathing human being - male and female - who now are to reflect God into the world, and reflect the praises of creation back to God. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CUaqQWGA53x/" target="_blank">NT Wright</a><br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>The whole point of the Kingdom of God is Jesus has come to bear witness to the true truth, which is nonviolent. When God wants to take charge of the world, He doesn't send in the tanks. He sends in the poor and the meek. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CUaqQWGA53x/" target="_blank">NT Wright</a><br /></li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><h4>Michael Heiser <br /></h4></div><div><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>
<span>What the New Testament says about Jesus in this 
matrix of ideas in Christology has deep, deep Old Testament Ancient Near
 Eastern roots, and is not just a contrived invention. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CWZCt9xtH-5/" target="_blank">Michael Heiser</a></span><span> </span><br /><span></span></li></ul></div><div><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><span>Think of the â€œimageâ€ of God as a verb, and youâ€™ll get the
 idea. We were created to image God, to be his imagersâ€”to represent him 
or be his proxy to each other and to all the earth. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CWT5HMIM_V9/" target="_blank">Michael Heiser</a></span><span> <br /></span></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><span>You are better off knowing what a passage means than you are memorizing it. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CVYWQJqN1SR/" target="_blank">Michael Heiser</a></span>&nbsp; <br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>"<a href="https://www.instagram.com/drmshphd/">drmshphd</a> Second Temple literature is really important, and therefore, we ought to pay more attention to that material for understanding the Old Testament and how the New Testament uses the Old Testament than to our own denominational traditions. Now that might sound obvious, pay attention to the ancient writers more than you do a modern writer because the ancient writers have the worldview of the cognitive frame of reference in their head. The later guys donâ€™t. That might sound unbelievably simple and elementary and obvious but that is not intuitive for most people in church. It just isn't. Theyâ€™re not told about that.They're not trained to think that way. They've never seen it modeled for them. <b>The Bible becomes this thing that is filtered through their own personal Christian tradition and that becomes the meaning of the Bible for them. The Bible is used to reinforce something that their group or denomination or church believes. And that just isnâ€™t Bible study. Thatâ€™s not exegesis.</b>" <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CQe9Uk1nkt4/" target="_blank">Michael Heiser</a></li></ul></div><div><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>"Election and salvation are not synonyms." <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CQZfG4tgO6w/" target="_blank">Michael Heiser</a><br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><span>Yet Christians are trained to think that way about the 
Bible and the language of the Bible in an entirely different way from 
the way they use language and that's just a huge mistake. It's a 
fundamental flaw in the way we think about Scripture. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CQM7wc1li6R/" target="_blank">Michael Heiser</a><b><br /></b></span></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li><span><b>The New Testament is essentially an inspired commentary on the Old Testament. </b>So
 we need to pay attention to how the New Testament authors read the Old 
Testament, how they repurposed it, and their understanding of the it is 
not going to violate the Old Testament in its own original context. In 
fact, it will build on it. It will reinforce it. <a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/CP5ulo_nT52/" target="_blank">Michael Heiser</a></span></li></ul></div><div>
<br />
<br /></div>
<h4>
The Quote Collage</h4>
</div>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>Do what's right, because it's right, do it right, and do it right away. Unknown, first heard from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.heritagefamilyfellowship.net/">Pastor Art Aragon</a></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>I don't have all the answers, but I know the One Who does. Unknown&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>I must know what I must know. He who died and rose again has provided all I need. 2 Corinthians 9. Unknown&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>Seek first the kingdom of God and you'll prosper more on accident than you ever did on purpose. If you are not prospering it's either because you haven't been seeking God or haven't been long enough.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.awmi.net/">Andrew Womack</a>.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>Live like no-one else so you can live like no one else.<a href="http://www.daveramsey.com/home/">&nbsp;Dave Ramsey</a></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>Start Small Finish Big.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>Change isn't change until there's change. If you want change you'll have to change.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.heritagefamilyfellowship.net/">Pastor Art Aragon</a></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>An ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.ushistory.org/franklin/quotable/quote67.htm">Ben Franklin</a></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>Caffeine is proof that God intended us to be happy - "Kurt Quote"&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>"Do for some what you wish you could do for all" Original Author Unknown</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>"You CANNOT be anything you want to be; but, you CAN be a lot more of who&nbsp;you already are." Strengths Finders&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>"Don't be Vanilla, but if you truly are Vanilla, be the MOST Vanilla you can be!"&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>A change in one life can change the lives of an entire generation. -Jackie Bowler&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step. -&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/a_journey_of_a_thousand_miles_begins_with_a_single_step">Loazi, Chineese Philosopher</a>.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>A man of genius makes no mistakes; his errors are volitional and are the portals of discovery.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.brainyquote.com/quotes/quotes/j/jamesjoyce109198.html?src=t_genius">James Joyce</a></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>True genius resides in the capacity for evaluation of uncertain, hazardous, and conflicting information.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.brainyquote.com/quotes/quotes/w/winstonchu144998.html?src=t_genius">Winston Churchill</a></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>Jealousy is the tribute mediocrity pays to genius.<a href="http://www.brainyquote.com/quotes/quotes/f/fultonjsh162321.html?src=t_genius">&nbsp;Fulton J. Sheen</a></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>"Luck happens when hard work meets opportunity" #FortuneCookie</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>Delayed obedience is disobedience. Todd White</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>"Your smile is your logo, your personality is your business card, how you leave others feeling after having an experience with you becomes your trademark." Jay Danzie</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>â€œWe are all broken, thatâ€™s how the light gets through.â€ -Ernest Hemingway</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>A villain is a victim whose story hasn't been told</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>You can write the wrongs and begin to heal.</li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li>There are just two kinds of failures in this world. Those who thought and never did, and those who did and never thought. <br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Stop saying, â€œI need to write a bookâ€, and WRITE it!â€ <br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Paraphrase: I can do all things through the Anointing of the Anointed One which strengthens me. <br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>â€œWeâ€™re on a rock flying through space and itâ€™s a miracle weâ€™re alive at allâ€ John and Lin Anderson, Scottish Crime Writer. <br /></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>"God loves his people more than his institutions." Marge Anonymous, Jen's Friend</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Is this your 'best yes'? #BestYes - Paraphase of <a href="https://thebestyes.com" target="_blank">Lysa TerKeurst</a></li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>"I know I'm caught in the rip current of people pleasing when I dread saying yes but feel powerless to say no."&nbsp; #BestYes - Paraphase of <a href="https://thebestyes.com" target="_blank">Lysa TerKeurst</a>&nbsp;</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Toys were meant to be played with.</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>"If you can't explain it simplyâ€¦ you don't understand it well enough." (Either Albert Einstein or Michel de Montaigne).</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Silence Is Golden</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Scribe and Seer</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Aim for the stars. If you fall short you may still hit the moon.</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>"Things don't change when I talk to God; things change when God talks to me. Hearing God's voice has become the singular quest of my heart, the sole pursuit that alone satisfies the great longings of my heart." Page 11 The Secrets of the Secret Place, Bob Sorge</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>You are the hero of your story, live it.</li></ul><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>"If you change the way you look at things, the things you look at change" Wayne Dyer.&nbsp;</li><ul><li></li><li>Dyer, Wayne. Your Erroneous Zones. New York: Funk &amp; Wagnalls, 1976, 59</li></ul></ul><div><br /></div><h4 style="text-align: left;">
LIFE Mission Statement:</h4>
I am called to lead the Distressed, In-Debt, and Discontent (<a href="http://biblehub.com/niv/1_samuel/22.htm">1</a>), into the LIFE Jesus promised (<a href="http://biblehub.com/john/10-10.htm">2</a>), by showing them how to meditate on God's Words/Thoughts (renew the mind) (<a href="http://biblehub.com/joshua/1-8.htm">3</a>), training them to <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-life.html">Get Life</a> through an active relationship with God (spirit) and retraining the brokenness we were all born with (will/mind/soul) (<i><a href="https://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/romans/12-2.html" target="_blank">4</a></i>), and by telling stories that inspire (heart/emotions).<br />
<br />
Stories break down the barriers between heart and mind, helping both become stronger (<a href="http://biblehub.com/niv/2_samuel/23.htm">5</a><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/2-samuel/23-8.html"> </a>&amp; <a href="http://biblehub.com/2_corinthians/10-4.htm">6</a>). Stories can pull down strongholds which separate our heart from God's!<br />
<br />
We are all here on this earth at exactly the time we were meant to be, and the purpose of our life is to seek, grope for, and find God (<a href="http://biblehub.com/context/acts/17-26.htm">7</a>); come with me and we'll do LIFE together!<br />
<br />
<h4 style="text-align: left;">
LIFE Verses from the Bible:</h4>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li style="font-style: italic;"><i>David left Gath and escaped to the cave of Adullam. When his brothers and his fatherâ€™s household heard about it, they went down to him there. All those who were in distress or in debt or discontented gathered around him, and he became their commander. About four hundred men were with him.&nbsp;<a href="http://biblehub.com/niv/1_samuel/22.htm" target="_blank">1 Samuel 22 | NIV</a></i></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li style="font-style: italic;"><i>This Book of the Law shall not depart from your mouth, but you shall meditate on it day and night, so that you may be careful to do according to all that is written in it. For then you will make your way prosperous, and then you will have good success.&nbsp;<a href="http://biblehub.com/joshua/1-8.htm" target="_blank">Joshua 1:8 | English Standard Version</a></i></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li style="font-style: italic;"><i>... the weapons of our warfare are not worldly, but are powerful through God for the demolition of strongholds. We demolish arguments&nbsp;<a href="http://biblehub.com/2_corinthians/10-4.htm" target="_blank">2 Corinthians 10:4 | Holman Christian Standard Bible</a></i></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li style="font-style: italic;"><i>These are the names of Davidâ€™s mighty warriors:&nbsp;<a href="http://biblehub.com/niv/2_samuel/23.htm" target="_blank">2 Samuel 23:8 | NIV</a></i></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li style="font-style: italic;"><i>The thief comes only to steal and kill and destroy; I have come so that they may have LIFE, and may have it abundantly.&nbsp;<a href="http://biblehub.com/john/10-10.htm" target="_blank">John 10:10 | NET Bible</a></i></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li style="font-style: italic;"><i>26 And He has made from one blood every nation of men to dwell on all the face of the earth, and has determined their preappointed times and the boundaries of their dwellings, 27 so that they should seek the Lord, in the hope that they might grope for Him and find Him, though He is not far from each one of us;&nbsp;<a href="http://biblehub.com/context/acts/17-26.htm" target="_blank">Acts 17:26-27 | NKJV</a></i></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li style="font-style: italic;"><i>And do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind, that you may prove what is that good and acceptable and perfect will of God.&nbsp;<a href="https://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/romans/12-2.html" target="_blank">Romans 12:2 NKJV</a></i></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;">
<li><i>...Not by works of righteousness which we did ourselves, but in the measure of his mercy, he gave us salvation, through the washing of the new birth and the giving of new life in the Holy Spirit... <a href="https://www.biblestudytools.com/bbe/titus/3.html" target="_blank">Titus 3:4-5</a>, The Bible In Basic English</i></li>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;"><ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;"><ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;"><ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;"><ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;"><ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<ul style="text-align: left;"><ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<div style="text-align: left;">
</div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: left;">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: left;">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant |&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.ted.com/talks/emilie_wapnick_why_some_of_us_don_t_have_one_true_calling?language=en" style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Multipotentialite</a></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: left;">&nbsp;</div><div class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: left;">10/2019 <br /></div>
